description_long: This object is a small potted plant featuring a slender, upright stem with several elongated, flat green leaves arranged alternately along its length. The leaves are broad and slightly pointed, with a matte finish and a natural, organic shape. At the base, there are a few rounded, brownish elements that resemble either stones or the top of a simple, unadorned pot. The plant also displays a few lighter, beige-tipped buds or new leaves emerging from the stem. The overall appearance is minimalistic, with no visible decorative elements on the pot. This plant would be suitable for adding a touch of greenery to urban environments such as sidewalks, patios, or small garden beds.
description: A small, upright potted plant with broad green leaves and a simple, unadorned brown pot. The plant features a few beige-tipped buds and a natural, minimalistic look.
description_view_0: The plant is seen from the side, showing the upright stem, alternating green leaves, and a few brown pot elements at the base.
description_view_1: A front-facing view highlights the symmetrical arrangement of leaves and the brown pot base, with beige buds visible among the foliage.
description_view_2: This angled view emphasizes the overlapping leaves and the subtle curvature of the plant, with the pot partially obscured.
description_view_3: The plant is viewed from another side, revealing more of the brown pot elements and the spread of the lower leaves.
